The '''''Bespin Bandit''''' was a delta-shaped [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] with an off-set cockpit. It belonged to [[Uz Bonearm]] and it fought for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in the [[Battle of New Alderaan (Operation Shadow Hand)|battle of New Alderaan]] alongside ''[[Starhook Ten]]'' and ''[[Hyperspace Marauder]]''. It was equipped with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]].

{{Ship-stub}}
